name: claude-agentflow
description: Watch your Claude Code agents come alive as pixel-art characters in a 2D world

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @agentflow/server" "npm run dev -w @agentflow/client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @agentflow/shared && npm run build -w @agentflow/server && npm run build -w @agentflow/client
